scripts.test: nx run-many -t test:lib --projects=tempblot-parser,prettier-plugin-tempblot,tempblot && nx run-many -t test:types --projects=tempblot-parser,tempblot && nx run-many -t test:build --projects=tempblot && nx run tempblot-workspace:sherif && nx run tempblot-workspace:knip
